Home » Families » Required Documents for All Students

Required Documents for Each Student, Every Year

MNS Families:

⭑ Make sure you have sent in your Emergency Contact Form (below)! This is required for every student each year.

  • Emergency Contact Form

⭑ Be sure to complete your School Lunch Form each year, regardless of whether your child has school lunch or brings their own. This impacts school funding. You’re not required to provide any personal information.

⭑ Medication: If your child has allergies, asthma, or might require medication during school, you must submit a completed Medication Administration Form (MAF) from your doctor every year before school starts. All forms and translations can be found on the DOE health services page.

  • Allergy MAF
  • Asthma MAF
  • General Medicine MAF

All parents/guardians are encouraged to read the following:

  • Non-Discrimination Policy (translations are also featured)
    • Notice of Non-Discrimination Under Section 504

Please see District 2 Leadership Team resources, meeting dates, and meeting recordings here: DLT Website
